Compromise Of Incompetent Person In Scd 218 At 9:00 Am On June 10, 2003.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Timothy Pearce, Esq. for Petitioner Joseph Greco, trustee for Deborah Hannon an incompetent person.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $23,913.16 to be deposited into the Deborah Hannon Supplemental Needs Trust.
Order signed in open court.
